block.header: sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to nori tamapa ku kake maku mo kasikwo ki nipi kwi no opo miya ni ame no sita wosame tamapi si naka tu sumyera mikoto no omi tati wo myesi te noti no opo mikoto ni nori tamapi siku

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,0@天皇我御命良麻止詔久挂麻久毛畏岐,*

sentence.kanji: 天皇我御命良麻止詔久挂麻久毛畏岐
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to nori tamapa ku kake maku mo kasikwo ki

sentence.kanji: 新城乃大宮尔天下治給之
sentence.transcription: nipi kwi no opo miya ni ame no sita wosame tamapi si

sentence.kanji: 中都天皇能臣等乎召天
sentence.transcription: naka tu sumyera mikoto no omi tati wo myesi te
noti no opo mikoto ni nori tamapi siku

block.header: imasi tati wo myesi turu koto pa mikadwo ni tukape matu ra mu sama wosipe tamapi noritamapa mu to so myesi turu

sentence.transcription: imasi tati wo myesi turu
koto pa mikadwo ni tukape matu ra mu
sama wosipe tamapi noritamapa mu to so myesi turu

block.header: odapi ni paberi te moro moro kiki tamapeyo

sentence.transcription: odapi ni paberi te
moro moro kiki tamapeyo

block.header: tadasi ku akiraka ni kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te wa ga kwo sumyera mikoto ni tukape matu ri mamori tasuke mature

comment.raw: IP-MAT,3@朕子天皇仁奉侍利護助麻都礼,*

sentence.transcription: tadasi ku
akiraka ni kiywo ki
kokoro wo moti te

sentence.kanji: 朕子天皇仁奉侍利護助麻都礼
sentence.transcription: wa ga kwo sumyera mikoto ni tukape matu ri mamori tasuke mature

block.header: tugi te pa ko no pi tugi no mi kwo wo tasuke tukape matu re

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@継天方是太子乎助奉侍礼,*

sentence.kanji: 継天方是太子乎助奉侍礼
sentence.transcription: tugi te pa ko no pi tugi no mi kwo wo tasuke tukape matu re

block.header: wa ga wosipe tama pu mikoto ni sitagapa zu site opo kimi tati pa ono ga u masizi ki mikadwo no taputwo ki mi kurawi wo nozomi moto me pito wo izana pi asi ku kitana ki kokoro wo moti te sakasima ni aru pakari koto wo tate omi tati pa ono ga piki biki kore ni tuki kare ni yori tutu katakuna ni wiya na ki kokoro wo omopi te yokosima no pakari koto wo kamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,10@臣等方己我比伎婢企是尔託,*

sentence.transcription: wa ga wosipe tama pu
mikoto ni sitagapa zu site

sentence.kanji: 王等波己我得麻之字岐
sentence.transcription: opo kimi tati pa ono ga u masizi ki
mikadwo no taputwo ki
mi kurawi wo nozomi moto me
pito wo izana pi
asi ku kitana ki
kokoro wo moti te
sakasima ni aru
pakari koto wo tate

sentence.kanji: 臣等方己我比伎婢企是尔託
sentence.transcription: omi tati pa ono ga piki biki kore ni tuki
kare ni yori tutu
katakuna ni
wiya na ki
kokoro wo omopi te
yokosima no pakari koto wo kamapu

block.header: kaku ara mu pito domo woba ware kanarazu ama gakeri tamapi te mi sonapa si sirizoke tama pi sute tama pi kira pi tamapa mu mono so

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,1@人等乎波朕必天翔給天見行之退給比捨給比岐良比給牟,*

sentence.transcription: kaku ara mu

sentence.kanji: 人等乎波朕必天翔給天見行之退給比捨給比岐良比給牟
sentence.transcription: pito domo woba ware kanarazu ama gakeri tamapi te mi sonapa si sirizoke tama pi sute tama pi kira pi tamapa mu
mono so

block.header: ame tuti no sakipapi mo kagapura zi

sentence.transcription: ame tuti no sakipapi mo kagapura zi

block.header: kaku no sama siri te akiraka ni kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape matura mu pito woba utukusibwi tama pi aparemi tamapi te wosame tamapa mu mono so

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,3@人乎波慈給比愍給天治給牟,*

sentence.transcription: kaku no sama siri te
akiraka ni kiywo ki
kokoro wo moti te tukape matura mu

sentence.kanji: 人乎波慈給比愍給天治給牟
sentence.transcription: pito woba utukusibwi tama pi aparemi tamapi te wosame tamapa mu
mono so

block.header: mata ame no sakipapi mo kagapu ri naga ki yo ni kadwo taye zu tukape matu ri sakaye mu

sentence.transcription: mata ame no sakipapi mo kagapu ri
naga ki
yo ni
kadwo taye zu tukape matu ri sakaye mu

block.header: koko siri te tutusi mari kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape mature to nori tamapa mu to namo myesi turu to nori tama pi opose tama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: koko siri te tutusi mari
kiywo ki
kokoro wo moti te
tukape mature to
nori tamapa mu to namo

sentence.kanji: 召都流止勅比於保世給布
sentence.transcription: myesi turu to nori tama pi opose tama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku kake maku mo kasikwo ki wa ga ame no mikadwo sumyera ga opo mikoto moti te nori tamapi siku ware ni tukape matura mu moro moro no omi tati ware wo kimi to omopa mu pito pa opo kisaki ni yo ku tukape matu re

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-GEN,NP,2@朕我天乃御門帝皇我御命以天勅之久朕尔奉侍牟,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@5,PP-TOP,NP,4@人方太皇后仁能奉侍礼,*

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa ku
kake maku mo kasikwo ki

sentence.kanji: 朕我天乃御門帝皇我御命以天勅之久朕尔奉侍牟
sentence.transcription: wa ga ame no mikadwo sumyera ga opo mikoto moti te nori tamapi siku ware ni tukape matura mu
moro moro no omi tati ware wo kimi to omopa mu

sentence.kanji: 人方太皇后仁能奉侍礼
sentence.transcription: pito pa opo kisaki ni yo ku tukape matu re

block.header: ware wo omopi te aru ga goto ku koto ni na omopi

sentence.transcription: ware wo omopi te aru ga goto ku
koto ni
na omopi

block.header: tugi te pa wa ga kwo pi tugi no mi kwo ni akiraka ni kiywo ku puta gokoro na ku site tukape matu re

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@継天方朕子太子尔明仁浄久,*

sentence.kanji: 継天方朕子太子尔明仁浄久
sentence.transcription: tugi te pa wa ga kwo pi tugi no mi kwo ni akiraka ni kiywo ku
puta gokoro na ku site tukape matu re

block.header: ware pa kwo puta ri to ipu koto pa na si

sentence.transcription: ware pa kwo puta ri to ipu
koto pa na si

block.header: tada ko no pi tugi no mi kwo pito ri nomwi so wa ga kwo pa aru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@唯此太子一人乃味曾朕我子波在,*

sentence.kanji: 唯此太子一人乃味曾朕我子波在
sentence.transcription: tada ko no pi tugi no mi kwo pito ri nomwi so wa ga kwo pa aru

block.header: ko no kokoro siri te moro moro mamori tasuke tukape matu re

sentence.transcription: ko no kokoro siri te
moro moro mamori tasuke tukape matu re

block.header: sikaraba ware pa mi mwi tukarasi ku opomasi masu ni yorite pi tugi no mi kwo ni ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no tugi te pa saduke maturu to nori tamapi te ware ni nori tamapi siku ame no sita no maturi goto pa utukusibwi wo moti te wosame yo

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕波御身都可良之久於保麻之麻湏尔依天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,2@太子尔天都日嗣高御座乃継天方授麻都流止命天,*
IP-MAT,3@朕尔勅之久天下乃政事波慈乎以天治与,*

sentence.transcription: sikaraba

sentence.kanji: 朕波御身都可良之久於保麻之麻湏尔依天
sentence.transcription: ware pa mi mwi tukarasi ku opomasi masu ni yorite

sentence.kanji: 太子尔天都日嗣高御座乃継天方授麻都流止命天
sentence.transcription: pi tugi no mi kwo ni ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no tugi te pa saduke maturu to nori tamapi te

sentence.kanji: 朕尔勅之久天下乃政事波慈乎以天治与
sentence.transcription: ware ni nori tamapi siku ame no sita no maturi goto pa utukusibwi wo moti te wosame yo

block.header: mata kami pa samu bou no mi nori wo sakaye sime ipye de se si pito wo wosame matu ri tugi pa moro moro no ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no maturi wo tata zu simo pa ame no sita no opo mi takara wo aparemi tama pye

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復上波三宝乃御法乎隆之米,*
IP-MAT,3@次波諸天神地祇乃祭祀乎不絶下波天下乃諸人民乎愍給弊,*

sentence.kanji: 復上波三宝乃御法乎隆之米
sentence.transcription: mata kami pa samu bou no mi nori wo sakaye sime
ipye de se si
pito wo wosame matu ri

sentence.kanji: 次波諸天神地祇乃祭祀乎不絶下波天下乃諸人民乎愍給弊
sentence.transcription: tugi pa moro moro no ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no maturi wo tata zu simo pa ame no sita no opo mi takara wo aparemi tama pye

block.header: mata nori tamapi siku ko no mikadwo no kurawi to ipu mono pa ame no saduke tamapa nu pito ni saduke te pa tamotu koto mo e zu mata kapyeri te mwi mo porobwi nuru mono so

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa siku
ko no mikadwo no kurawi to ipu
mono pa ame no saduke tamapa nu
pito ni saduke te pa
tamotu
koto mo e zu
mata kapyeri te
mwi mo porobwi nuru
mono so

block.header: wa ga tate te aru pito to ipu tomo mimasi ga kokoro ni yo kara zu to siri me ni mi te mu pito woba aratame te tate mu koto pa kokoro no mani ma seyo to nori tamapi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,6@事方心乃麻而麻世与止命伎,*

sentence.transcription: wa ga tate te aru
pito to
ipu tomo
mimasi ga kokoro ni yo kara zu to siri
me ni mi te mu
pito woba aratame te tate mu

sentence.kanji: 事方心乃麻而麻世与止命伎
sentence.transcription: koto pa kokoro no mani ma seyo to nori tamapi ki

block.header: mata nori tamapi siku wa ga aduma bito ni tati wo saduke te pabera simuru koto pa mimasi no tika ki mamori to site mamora simeyo to omopi te namo aru

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕我東人尔授刀天侍之牟留,*

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapi siku

sentence.kanji: 朕我東人尔授刀天侍之牟留
sentence.transcription: wa ga aduma bito ni tati wo saduke te pabera simuru
koto pa mimasi no tika ki
mamori to site
mamora simeyo to
omopi te namo aru

block.header: ko no aduma bito pa tune ni ipa ku pitapi ni pa ya pa tatu tomo se pa ya pa tatazi to ipi te kimi wo pito tu kokoro wo moti te mamoru mono so

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是東人波常尔云久額尔方箭波立止毛,*

sentence.kanji: 是東人波常尔云久額尔方箭波立止毛
sentence.transcription: ko no aduma bito pa tune ni ipa ku pitapi ni pa ya pa tatu tomo
se pa ya pa tatazi to ipi te
kimi wo pito tu kokoro wo moti te mamoru
mono so

block.header: ko no kokoro siri te mimasi tukapye to nori tama pi si opo mikoto wo wasure zu

sentence.transcription: ko no kokoro siri te
mimasi tukapye to nori tama pi si
opo mikoto wo wasure zu

block.header: kaku no sama satori te moro moro no aduma kuni no pito domo tutu simari tukape matu re

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸東国乃人等謹之末利奉侍礼,*

sentence.transcription: kaku no sama satori te

sentence.kanji: 諸東国乃人等謹之末利奉侍礼
sentence.transcription: moro moro no aduma kuni no pito domo tutu simari tukape matu re

block.header: sikaru ni kake maku mo kasikwo ki puta tokoro no sumyera ga opo mikoto wo wa ga itadaki ni uke tamapari te piru mo yworu mo omoposi moti te are domo yosi na ku site pito ni ipi kika simuru koto e zu napo ari ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP;@3,IP-REL,PP,NP,PP-GEN,NP,1@二所乃天皇我御命乎朕我頂尔受賜天,*
IP-MAT,NP;@3,IP-REL,IP-ADV,2@昼毛夜毛念持天在止毛,*

sentence.transcription: sikaru ni kake maku mo kasikwo ki

sentence.kanji: 二所乃天皇我御命乎朕我頂尔受賜天
sentence.transcription: puta tokoro no sumyera ga opo mikoto wo wa ga itadaki ni uke tamapari te

sentence.kanji: 昼毛夜毛念持天在止毛
sentence.transcription: piru mo yworu mo omoposi moti te are domo
yosi na ku site
pito ni ipi kika simuru
koto e zu napo ari ki

block.header: kore ni yori te moro moro no pito ni kika sime mu to namo myesi turu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@此尔依天諸乃人尔令聞止奈毛召都留,*

sentence.kanji: 此尔依天諸乃人尔令聞止奈毛召都留
sentence.transcription: kore ni yori te moro moro no pito ni kika sime mu to namo myesi turu

block.header: kare koko wo motite ima wa ga imasi tati wo wosipe tamapa mu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@故是以今朕我汝等乎教給牟,*

sentence.kanji: 故是以今朕我汝等乎教給牟
sentence.transcription: kare koko wo motite ima wa ga imasi tati wo wosipe tamapa mu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: sore kimi no kurawi pa negapi motomuru wo moti te uru koto pa ito kata si to ipu koto woba mwina siri te are domo saki no pito pa pakari goto wodina si ware pa yo ku tuyo ku pakari te kanarazu e te mu to omopi te kusa gusa ni negapi inore domo napo syosyau ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no mi tama no yurusi tamapa zu saduke tamapa nu mono ni are ba ono dukara ni pito mo mawosi arapasi ono ga kuti wo moti te mo ipi tutu kapyeri te mwi wo porobosi wazapapi wo kagapuri te tupi ni tumi wo onore mo pito mo onazi ku itasi tu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@夫君乃位波願求乎以天得,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,7@猶諸聖天神地祇御霊乃不免給不授給,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,8@物尔在波自然尔人毛申顕,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@6,12@終尔罪乎己毛他毛同久致都,*

sentence.kanji: 夫君乃位波願求乎以天得
sentence.transcription: sore kimi no kurawi pa negapi motomuru wo moti te uru
koto pa ito kata si to ipu
koto woba mwina siri te are domo
saki no pito pa pakari goto wodina si
ware pa yo ku tuyo ku pakari te
kanarazu e te mu to omopi te
kusa gusa ni negapi inore domo

sentence.kanji: 猶諸聖天神地祇御霊乃不免給不授給
sentence.transcription: napo syosyau ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no mi tama no yurusi tamapa zu saduke tamapa nu

sentence.kanji: 物尔在波自然尔人毛申顕
sentence.transcription: mono ni are ba ono dukara ni pito mo mawosi arapasi

sentence.kanji: 己我口乎以天毛云都々変天
sentence.transcription: ono ga kuti wo moti te mo ipi tutu kapyeri te
mwi wo porobosi
wazapapi wo kagapuri te

sentence.kanji: 終尔罪乎己毛他毛同久致都
sentence.transcription: tupi ni tumi wo onore mo pito mo onazi ku itasi tu

block.header: kore ni yori te ame tuti wo urami kimi omi wo mo urami nu

sentence.transcription: kore ni yori te ame tuti wo urami
kimi omi wo mo urami nu

block.header: napo kokoro wo aratame te napo ku kiywo ku ara ba ame tuti mo nikumi tamapa zu kimi mo sute tamapa zu site sakipapi wo kagapuri mwi mo yasu kye mu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@猶心乎改天直久浄久在波,*

sentence.kanji: 猶心乎改天直久浄久在波
sentence.transcription: napo kokoro wo aratame te napo ku kiywo ku ara ba
ame tuti mo nikumi tamapa zu
kimi mo sute tamapa zu site
sakipapi wo kagapuri
mwi mo yasu kye mu

block.header: iki te pa tukasa kurawi wo tamapa ri sakaye sini te pa yo ki na wo topo ki yo ni nagasi tutape te mu

sentence.transcription: iki te pa
tukasa kurawi wo tamapa ri
sakaye sini te pa yo ki
na wo topo ki
yo ni nagasi tutape te mu

block.header: ko no yuwe ni saki no sakasi ki pito ipi te ara ku mwi pa papi to tomo ni tuti ni udumo ri nuredo na pa keburi to tomo ni ame ni noboru to ip ye ri mata ipa ku ayamati wo siri te pa kanarazu aratame yo yo ki wo e te pa wasuru na to ipu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,8@能乎得天方莫忘止伊布,*

sentence.transcription: ko no yuwe ni saki no sakasi ki
pito ipi te ara ku
mwi pa papi to
tomo ni tuti ni udumo ri nuredo
na pa keburi to
tomo ni ame ni noboru to ip ye ri
mata ipa ku
ayamati wo siri te pa kanarazu aratame yo

sentence.kanji: 能乎得天方莫忘止伊布
sentence.transcription: yo ki wo e te pa wasuru na to ipu

block.header: sikaru mono wo kuti ni ware pa kiywo si to ipi te kokoro ni kitana ki woba ame no opopa zu tuti no nose nu mono to nari nu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@然物乎口尔我方浄之止云天,*

sentence.kanji: 然物乎口尔我方浄之止云天
sentence.transcription: sikaru mono wo kuti ni ware pa kiywo si to ipi te
kokoro ni kitana ki woba ame no opopa zu
tuti no nose nu
mono to nari nu

block.header: ko wo tamotu i pa tatape wo ita si suturu i pa sosiri wo maneki tu

sentence.transcription: ko wo tamotu
i pa tatape wo ita si suturu
i pa sosiri wo maneki tu

block.header: napo wa ga taputwo bwi woroga mi dokuzyu si matu ru saisyou waugyau no wau bopu syau ron bon ni nori tamapa ku mosi zen aku no gepu wo tukuru toki ni pa yo ku genzai no naka ni syoten mo tomo ni godi site so no zen aku no pou wo simyesu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,2@最勝王経乃王法正論品尔命久,*

sentence.transcription: napo wa ga taputwo bwi woroga mi
dokuzyu si matu ru

sentence.kanji: 最勝王経乃王法正論品尔命久
sentence.transcription: saisyou waugyau no wau bopu syau ron bon ni nori tamapa ku
mosi zen aku no gepu wo tukuru toki ni pa yo ku
genzai no naka ni syoten mo tomo ni godi site
so no zen aku no pou wo simyesu

block.header: koku zin no aku gepu wo tukuru wo wau no sutete kinsei se zu ara mu i pa kore syauri ni zyun se zu

sentence.transcription: koku zin no aku gepu wo tukuru wo wau no sutete
kinsei se zu ara mu
i pa kore syauri ni zyun se zu

block.header: dipin se mu koto masa ni nori no goto ku seyo to nori tamapi te ari

sentence.transcription: dipin se mu koto masa ni nori no goto ku seyo to nori tamapi te ari

block.header: koko wo moti te imasi tati wo wosipe mitibi ku

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是乎以天汝等乎教導久,*

sentence.kanji: 是乎以天汝等乎教導久
sentence.transcription: koko wo moti te imasi tati wo wosipe mitibi ku

block.header: ko no yo ni pa se ken no yau puku wo kagapu ri tadasi ku kiywo ki na wo arapa si noti no yo ni pa nin den no syau raku wo uke te tupi ni potoke to nare to omoposi te namo moro moro ni ko no koto wo wosipe tama pu to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,0@今世尔方世間乃栄福乎蒙利,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,3@後世尔方人天乃勝楽乎受天,*

sentence.kanji: 今世尔方世間乃栄福乎蒙利
sentence.transcription: ko no yo ni pa se ken no yau puku wo kagapu ri
tadasi ku kiywo ki
na wo arapa si

sentence.kanji: 後世尔方人天乃勝楽乎受天
sentence.transcription: noti no yo ni pa nin den no syau raku wo uke te
tupi ni potoke to
nare to
omoposi te namo

sentence.kanji: 諸尔是事乎教給布止詔布
sentence.transcription: moro moro ni ko no koto wo wosipe tama pu to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku ko no tama pu obi wo tamapari te imasi tati no kokoro wo totonope napo si wa ga wosipe koto ni tagapa zu site tuka ne wosame mu sirusi to namo ko no obi wo tamapa ku to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: mata nori tamapa ku ko no tama pu
obi wo tamapari te

sentence.kanji: 汝等乃心乎等等能倍直之
sentence.transcription: imasi tati no kokoro wo totonope napo si
wa ga wosipe
koto ni tagapa zu site
tuka ne wosame mu
sirusi to namo
ko no obi wo tamapa ku to noritama pu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
